claim: Lower-coupling factory modules can be moved behind the factory namespace before the more central scaffold module moves.
mechanism: The factory namespace already gave callers a stable seam. That allows less-coupled factory modules such as category templates and gap analysis to move first, while leaving scaffold in place until a later tranche. This staged move reduces risk because the repo gains a real implementation boundary without forcing the most central factory module to move at the same time.
boundary: This is not the full factory-surface move. Scaffold remains top-level for now because it is more central and more likely to ripple through the repo.
